2026-06-02PSRoyal Canadian Mounted Police ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Management Advisory Board for the Royal Canadian Mounted PoliceReappointment of Patricia Grier of Calgary, Alberta, as a part-time member of the Management Advisory Board for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year, effective June 22, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Management Advisory Board for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police
precis: Reappointment of Patricia Grier of Calgary, Alberta, as a part-time member of the Management Advisory Board for the Royal Canadian Mounted Police, to hold office during pleasure for a term of one year, effective June 22, 2026.
